heading: Azure (Microsoft Azure) Private Link Connection Strings
body:
[Private Endpoint-Aware Connection Strings](private-endpoint-connection-strings)
connection strings follow this format:

```sh
mongodb://pl-0-eastus2.ab123.mongodb.net:1024
mongodb+srv://pl-0-eastus2.ab123.mongodb.net
```

If you enable the [Regionalized Private Endpoints for Multi-Region Sharded Clusters](atlas_regionalized-pl) setting, Azure Private Link connection strings follow
this format:

```sh
mongodb://pl-0-eastus2.ab123.mongodb.net:1024
mongodb+srv://cluster0-pl-0-eastus2.ab123.mongodb.net
```

URI (Uniform Resource Identifier)s using this format can be reachable via the Azure (Microsoft Azure) VNet where
someone configured Private Link, though access can be transitive from
other VNets peered in turn.
